productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Navy Blue White Track Pant
description: CompositionFull length navy blue and white track pants made of polyester, with welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the leg lengthFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironWith this Climalite enabled track pants, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics, these track pants keep your body dry by drawing sweat away from your body helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these adidas track pants keep you comfortably cool. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The draw strings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move.
